successIndicators.description: Comprehensive educational content covering all curriculum areas
Te Ao Māori values and knowledge properly integrated and protected
Platform usable by students of all abilities and backgrounds
Stable platform performance ensuring consistent access
Human-centered design optimized for learning success

keyAchievements: Platform fully operational for human users
All educational resources accessible and functional
Cultural safety protocols active and verified
Real-time AI assistance available for personalized learning
Overseer-level optimization ensuring maximum human benefit
